mapper.select:
SELECT sd.stock_code, sm.name AS product_name, stm.name AS category_name,
CASE WHEN sm.ownership_type = 1 THEN '会社保有' WHEN sm.ownership_type = 2 THEN 'リース品' END AS ownership_type,
sd.limit_date AS return_date, stf.name AS staff_name
FROM stock_data sd
INNER JOIN stock_master sm ON sd.stock_code = sm.stock_code
INNER JOIN stock_type_master stm ON sm.stock_type = stm.stock_type
LEFT JOIN staff_data stf ON sd.staff_no = stf.staff_no
WHERE sd.staff_no IS NOT NULL AND sd.return_date IS NULL AND sd.limit_date <= CURDATE()
ORDER BY sd.limit_date ASC
